originalGoal: Harden the vLLM inference blueprint operator for production readiness. This is a Tangle Blueprint that serves LLM inference via vLLM with ShieldedCredits anonymous billing. Fix every compiler warning, fix the hardcoded vLLM endpoint in lib.rs (should read from config), implement proper vLLM stderr log draining in vllm.rs, add request concurrency limiting in server.rs (max_concurrent_requests from config is defined but not enforced), fix all pub visibility mismatches, remove dead code. Add a GitHub Actions CI workflow that runs cargo fmt --check, cargo clippy, cargo test, and forge test. Add comprehensive Rust unit tests for config parsing, health/GPU detection (with mock nvidia-smi output), billing signature verification (with test vectors), and the HTTP server request validation. Every test must pass. Every warning must be resolved.

successCriteria: cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings produces zero errors
cargo test --workspace passes with new tests covering config, health, billing, and server modules
A .github/workflows/ci.yml exists and would pass locally
The hardcoded vLLM endpoint http://127.0.0.1:8000 in lib.rs is replaced with config-driven endpoint
vllm.rs drains stderr via tokio BufReader instead of the TODO comment
server.rs enforces max_concurrent_requests from config using a semaphore or similar
work is grounded in actual repository state
completion is backed by executed checks or explicit blocker evidence
executionNotes: Run ALL check commands before declaring done, including formatting and lint.
If checks fail, fix the issues — do not skip them.
If the task is ambiguous, preserve the original goal and add inferred criteria separately.
